seoTitle: Eaglemont vs Earlston — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eaglemont and Earlston. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eaglemont and Earlston.
heading: Eaglemont vs Earlston — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eaglemont, Victoria and Earlston, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Earlston has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Eaglemont (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eaglemont or Earlston safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eaglemont has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Earlston scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eaglemont scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Earlston scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eaglemont or Earlston?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Earlston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
